data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of sending a digital ticket to the client.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement that a digital ticket is sent to the client email/app. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is operational. The linked use case mentions the need for a digital ticket, but there are no concrete details or evidence to support that this requirement has been satisfied, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of digital ticket being sent to client email/app.
